cenas.dalle_prompt: Dynamic montage of a dog performing the week's commands: a perfect sit, a solid stay, and a quick down, all in quick succession with upbeat music, cinematic quality, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: Fast-paced cuts with energetic transitions, maybe a swipe or a quick zoom, to showcase the new skills learned

cenas.dalle_prompt: A checklist infographic for Week 2: 'Comando Senta', 'Comando Fica', 'Comando Deita'. Each item gets a satisfying green checkmark, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: Each checkmark animates in with a distinct, satisfying sound, confirming the completion of each core command

cenas.dalle_prompt: A person is preparing the dog's meal. The dog performs a sequence: sits, waits patiently (fica), and only goes to the bowl after a release command. A perfect demonstration of the week's skills combined, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: A continuous shot that follows the sequence of commands, showing the dog's impulse control and understanding

cenas.grok_movement: The circle and gold star animate onto the calendar with a little sparkle effect, reinforcing the sense of accomplishment

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final screen with text 'Semana 2 Concluída! Você está no controle!', with a preview of next week's topic 'Próxima Semana: Controle Básico (Deixa, Larga, Guia)', building anticipation, 8k quality
